name: Dump Cake (Marcy Stephens)
recipeIngredient: 1 can Pineapple, 20 oz, crushed with juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread cherry pie filling in a 9x13-inch pan.
2. On top of this, spread crushed pineapple.
3. Sprinkle dry cake evenly over the pineapple mixture.
4. Melt 2 sticks of margarine and pour it over the dry ingredients.
5. Sprinkle with coconut and top with chopped pecans.
6. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour.
